overview: A research paper marketplace landing page connecting student researchers with publishers. Students upload original research papers with keywords and tags; publishers discover curated work and purchase rights to transform it into newsletters, articles, posts, and more via AI.
features: Hero section with elegant brown-gold-beige-white-black palette
Students value section highlighting recognition and payment for academic work
Publishers value section showcasing AI-powered content transformation
Waitlist signup form with email and user type (student/publisher)
Minimalistic, stylishly academic typography with light Jakarta Sans font
Fully responsive design — mobile and desktop
